programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: Gorilla's Gone Wild
programme.desc: Cragger angers the Gorilla tribe and they march to the Crocodile Swamp to teach him a lesson. But the Gorilla Mechs are not fit for the swampy water and the Lions and Eagles must come to the rescue. The only problem is that the Lions don't like water ... at all!

programme.title: The Haunted and the Hunted!
programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible - but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: Laval and Li'Ella's relationship grows as he gives her a tour of the Lion City. But distracted, he misses a key battle against the Hunters. Tormak joins the fight and saves the day. But the Lion King Lagravis is captured and brought to the Ice Fort. Who will lead the Lions now?!?

programme.title: Friends Reunite
programme.desc: Olly about how his obsession is affecting their relationships. Olly refuses to see the damage he's causing, but it becomes clear that he's lost touch with what really matters.

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Maximum Overload
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Marvel's Super Heroes take on a mischievous Loki and a team of super villains in an all-new LEGO adventure

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: The CHI Jackers

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a Brain Evolution Achievement Negatizer, or B.E.A.N., in order to make all of Mobius stupid. But instead of turning Sonic and Tails into dummies, the BEAN device turns them into three year old babies!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Driven by his intense slug phobia, scientist Quentin Kozinski has invented mechanical slugs. Armed with this fearsome arsenal, he sets out to prove that science can beat any slug and any slinger including the Shane Gang! But Eli is determined to prove that no thinking, living thing can ever be bested by a machine.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A mysterious slugslinging master appears for the first time in 20 years. Though old, this slinger is an amazing battler incredibly fast and the master of an unstoppable slinging technique. Eli, Kord, Trixie and Pronto all want to study with the master and learn this awesome move. But so does Dr. Blakk's protégé Twist! Now Eli must face off against Twist and prevent the master from choosing a villain for a student.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Blakk has hired Brutale - a thug as brutal as his name - to build a Deep Water Rig to drill for Dark Water at the bottom of the Cavern Sea. Needing some water-breathing labor for the job, Brutale steals Marvolio Drake's reptilian pirate crew. Desperate to get his men back, Drake forms an unlikely alliance with the Shane Gang, who are just as desperate to shut the Dark Water rig down.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Lumino cavern is under attack! A swarm of Neurotox ghoul slugs have created a massive toxic cloud that's attacking the residents. The Shane Gang must brave an inescapable maze called the Cavern of Time to locate Blite, the only man who knows enough about regular Neotox slugs to help them stop the cloud created by the ghouls. Just a few problems with that plan: Blite is a deadly maniac, whose reign of terror ended only after Will Shane trapped him in the Cavern of Time.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and Kord have been trying to create a fusion shot: two slugs shot at exactly the same time that can merge their powers! But they'll need to mod Eli's blaster to handle it. In search of the one missing part that will complete Eli's Double Barreled Blaster, the gang journey to the Scrap Heap, a junk yard cavern of epic proportions. Finding the part isn't easy. Getting out with it alive past Boss Ember and his Scrap Force is nearly impossible.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When Eli and the Shane Gang find themselves trapped in the Deep Caverns underneath Slugterra they discover a whole new type of danger threatening to escape. Allowing it past the barrier would mean unprecedented peril - not only for Slugterra, but our world above too!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Armed with his powerful new weapon the Gatling Blaster, Blakk's unstoppable battle train threatens to run roughshod over all of Slugterra - unless Eli can master his new Double Barrel Blaster and come up with a powerful fusion move in time to stop it.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Locke and Lode have run roughshod over a cavern and The Shane Gang aim to kick them out. But the townspeople have their own hero to clean up the town - none other than the King of Sling, a pompous Slugslinger the gang has bested on a number of occasions. There is no way he'll survive against two of Blakk's minions, but Eli can't intervene without humiliating the king! So the Shane Gang decide to work behind the scenes to make the king victorious. That is until Dr. Blakk himself arrives.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang's been captured by the zombifying Mr. Saturday! Locked up in Stalagmite 17, they are helpless as Dr. Blakk begins the trip there to collect them. Only one hope remains... the two members of the Shane Gang Saturday didn't capture: Pronto and Burpy. Can this mismatched pair pull off an impressive prison break?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang follow Diablos Nacho to Molemound - the Molenoid home cavern. Pronto doesn't want to go - and not because he's in trouble. It turns out Pronto is the rightful KING of the Molenoids. He's been ducking the crown for years since the king's main responsibility is settling arguments and fixing leaky plumbing. But Pronto must play king for a day while the Shane Gang follows Nacho into the great Molenoid library to stop him from taking a valuable map.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Burpy is sick, and the only thing that will cure him is a trip to the Lightwell - a mysterious, hidden power source only slugs (and the Shadow Clan) know the way to. Burpy can't make it on his own, so Eli vows to take him there. He convinces the Shadow Clan to point the way, but the journey is fraught with peril. Meanwhile the rest of the Shane Gang must fight side by side with the Shadow Clan when Blakk's minions attack.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A mysterious creature is draining the energy from all the slugs in a distant cavern, and the residents are offering a rich reward to whoever can stop it. Mercenaries come out of the woodwork hoping for the prize, but the Shane Gang aim to stop it for free. That's what they do. It turns out this creature is more dangerous than anyone could imagine, and one by one, the hunters are taken out of the game-leaving only Eli and the reviled STOCKER remaining.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has been captured! Now it's up to the Shane Gang to transport him to Stalagmite 17, the only prison that can hold him. To do so, they're going to need some serious speed. That's just what they get when we reveal Kord's new modifications to their Mecha Beasts! But will it be enough to stand up to Blakk's own newly-designed super vehicles?

To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Victoria sube en las encuestas y eso preocupa a Elsa, quien, en un intento desesperado por ganar votantes, le propone a Max cerrar Villa Catalina. El Chema comienza a interesarse en Rutila.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Elsa visita a Victoria y le propone una tregua para trabajar juntas contra el narcotráfico. Max está dispuesto a perder el juicio de Ximena para demostrar con quién está su fidelidad.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: El Chema ordena la emboscada para recuperar al hijo de Matilde cuando ella se arrepiente, ya es demasiado tarde. Mientras trata de escapar con sus nietos, doña Alba es brutalmente herida.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro desarma a Verónica. Ella no quiere que se vaya del pueblo. Los dos saben que se quieren. El comisionado Balmaceda enfrenta a Antonia. Ricardo comienza a tratarse de la impotencia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Sacan esposada a Antonia de su hacienda Balmaceda es obligado a llevársela cargada. Verónica le da pistas al comisionado. Lucho teme que el mismo policía que lo llevó a prisión descubra todo.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Eliza decide casarse con Andrés. Alondra bebe limonada adulterada y Sofía se lleva el recipiente para ser analizado.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Bajo los efectos de la burundanga, Alondra repite el discurso que le sembró Paula en contra de su amiga. Alejandra la echa, pidiéndole que no le hable mas. Eliza anuncia su divorcio con Max.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Con los resultados en la mano, el agente de Interpol le revela a Sofia que la droga que su hija consume, puede causarle daño neurológico y hasta un infarto cerebral.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Una ceremonia en la terminal sella el amor entre Chivis y Manuel. Lucía asiste al acto y Vicente aprovecha para darle a Majo el anillo de compromiso. Poncho acepta ser el sucesor de Manuel.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Lucía intenta hacer las paces con Majo antes de irse a México. Las Villaseñor buscan a Antonio, quien no contesta las llamadas telefónicas. Don Benito le pide a Chivis la mano de Trini.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Stella visita a Chivis en la mansión, le pide perdón y se ofrece como su aliada para recuperar a Manuel. Chivis tiene su primera junta como decoradora. Lucía tiene el equipaje preparado.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Rosa es abandonada de bebé, pero con la manutención segura. Hoy en día es rebelde e independiente. José Ignacio Altamirano, seductor y mentiroso, ve a Rosa y queda prendado de ella.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Eva, mejor amiga de Rosa, conoce a José Ignacio y se enamora de inmediato, pero Rosa descifra el estilo de él y pronto lo confronta. Eduardo Sotomayor visita a su nieta, Eva, en el internado.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Mientras José Ignacio juega al prometido con Bárbara, a Eva y Rosa les cambia la vida. Raquel Altamirano visita a Rosaura Sotomayor, mucho ha pasado entre ellas, el presente les preocupa.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Bárbara por fin logra que Rosaura y Eduardo accedan conocer a su novio, aunque sea un Altamirano. Eduardo conversa con Andrea Fernández, empleada de la empresa, pues tiene una confesión que hacerle.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Eduardo tiene muchas cosas que decirle a José Ignacio y la rabia lo deja sin palabras por eso le pide a su joven abogado que cuide de sus nietas, pero Gabriel Robles tiene planes ambiciosos.

programme.title: Amar a muerte

programme.title: Amar a muerte

programme.title: Amar a muerte

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía le reclama a Miguel que vaya a salir con Luz Viviana. Gastón se enfurece al descubrir a Miguel y Mía besándose. Todos los chicos se sorprenden al encontrarse en su viaje a Canadá. Franco se entera de que Carlos y Alma piensan vivir en Nueva York.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia y Miguel se besan pero Gastón los interrumpe con una llamada. Por su parte, Madariaga recuerda las clases en la escuela y se pone nostálgico. Además, Diego confunde a Roberta con Paola.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Renata acusa a Madariaga de ser un asesino. Georgi le confiesa a Roberta el inmenso amor que siente por Luján. Roberta y sus compañeros del colegio idean un plan para demostrarle a Renata que Madariaga es un buen hombre.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Franco visita a escondidas a las hijas de Sofía y se encuentra con Sarita. Juan le pide a Sofía matrimonio. Gabriela encuentra un cinturón relacionado con la muerte de los padres de Juan y junto con Fernando planean utilizarlo a su favor.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro

programme.desc: Roberta le avisa a Agustín que Renata y Jerónimo irán juntos a una boda. Matilde le reclama a Carlos el no haberle dicho que Marina está embarazada de Jerónimo.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Matías decide ayudar a Adriana en su plan con Chema. Chema tiene un desmayo y comienza a preocuparse por su salud. Inicia el juicio contra Fina y con ello un recuento por sus fechorías.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro

programme.desc: Un apuesto hombre divertido y seductor intenta conquistar a una bella joven, que resulta ser un travesti.

programme.title: Marejada
programme.desc: Un médico va a trabajar a la costa, pero el presidente municipal lo recibe con indiferencia y solo se hace amigo de un niño.

programme.title: Lástima de ropa
programme.desc: Un par de albañiles comienzan a trabajar en la fábrica del millonario Arturo. El rico empresario sale una noche en su auto y un malvado delincuente lo asalta, pero su mejor amigo lo lleva a la casa de una cabaretera.

programme.title: México nunca duerme
programme.desc: Una joven va con su novio a bailar y la abuela de ella sale a buscarla de noche en delegaciones, discotecas y cabarets.

programme.title: Salón Mexico
programme.desc: Mercedes trabaja como cabaretera para costear los estudios de su hermana. Los problemas comienzan cuando Mercedes y Paco, su explotador, ganan un concurso de danza, pero él se niega a compartir el premio con ella.

programme.title: Lástima de ropa
programme.desc: Un par de albañiles comienzan a trabajar en la fábrica del millonario Arturo. El rico empresario sale una noche en su auto y un malvado delincuente lo asalta, pero su mejor amigo lo lleva a la casa de una cabaretera.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Pedro queda viudo justo cuando su mujer acababa de tener un hijo. Tras este terrible suceso, su hermano y su esposa intentan aprovecharse de él. Después de un tiempo se da cuenta que su hermano no hace nada y se está aprovechando de él.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una joven se obsesiona con su profesor y trata de tener una relación con él, pero él la rechaza. La chica hace unas pruebas falsas para que todos crean que él trató de seducirla.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Don Tomás y su esposa Lupe están por inaugurar su cafetería, mientras eligen el nombre que llevará, ella sufre un desmayo y la llevan al hospital. Lupe muere y después de un triste funeral, los hijos de Don Tomás deciden con quién se quedará.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un joven es desalojado de su casa porque su madre la hipotecó y nunca hizo ningún pago. Su madre sufre un accidente y pierde la memoria él cree que lo abandonó, sus vecinos lo ayudan y le dan hospedaje en su casa.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Miriam es una adolescente que, por falta de atención de sus padres, cae en una broma pesada por internet. El padre de Miriam es aficionado a ver páginas en internet de adolescentes y encuentra las fotos de su hija en una página prohibida.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Sebastian es un joven pintor que quiere conseguir a la mejor modelo para el concurso anual de retrato desnudo de la academia donde estudia. Sin embargo se enamora de María Domínguez lo cual provoca una disputa con Gala.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Dime de que presumes y te diré de que careces
programme.desc: Diana es una chica que se lastima a sí misma para llamar la atención y sentir un alivio ante los problemas que existen en su casa. Diana se enamora de Adrián, un nuevo compañero de la escuela pero provoca los celos de Rebeca, su mejor amiga.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un joven se dedica a vender drogas en su escuela, un profesor se entera y lo denuncia. El joven les cuenta a los hombres que le venden la droga sobre su profesor y ellos lo golpean hasta dejarlo inconsciente.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños demostrarán su gran talento en un reto de baile y canto. Verónica Castro, Miguel Bosé, Albertano y Karol Sevilla tendrán la dura tarea de seleccionar a los miembros de los escuadrones.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: La batalla entre los seis escuadrones da inicio y cada punto será vital para salvarse de la sentencia. Los pequeños demostrarán su talento a través de su carisma, su voz, sus pasos de baile y sus increíbles habilidades.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Uno de los seis escuadrones dice adiós y antes de irse, Tadeo le hace una petición especial a los jueces. Los capitanes cuentan sus historias de vida de una manera muy peculiar. Los pequeños bailarines muestran sus mejores pasos.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Grandes estrellas de la música acompañan a los pequeños en el reto de canto. La bailarina argentina, Laurita Fernández, se une como jueza invitada para calificar los retos de baile. Los capitanes rinden homenaje a Verónica Castro.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Salmo 100 es una organización que lleva mensajes de paz y reconciliación. Las historias de Daniel, Adrián o Giovanni son ejemplos de que usa Salmo 100 para ayudar a más personas que quieren salir del mundo del crimen organizado en la frontera.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Las redadas que realizan los agentes de migración han hecho que el miedo tome muchos vecindarios de Estados Unidos. Las historias de quienes han sido deportados son contadas. También, las historias de quienes viven temerosos de ser deportados.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El temor a las deportaciones masivas aumentó después de que el Departamento de Seguridad Nacional anunciara nuevas reglas que priorizan las expulsiones de inmigrantes indocumentados.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Familias trabajadoras están pensando dos veces antes de salir a su empleo o enviar a los niños a la escuela por temor de ser sorprendidos por las autoridades en la calle o usando el transporte público.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Los mirreyes son la nueva generación de los hijos de papi. Privilegiados y desafiantes, tratan con desprecio a quienes les sirven. Los secretos de los hijos de los ricos y los poderosos son la evidencia de la guerra de clases en el México de hoy.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Fueron interrogados y pronto las preguntas se convirtieron en golpes. El drama de quienes han sufrido la tortura en carne propia y un exmilitar justifica sus acciones.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Intimidación e insultos racistas, amenazas y ataques físicos. Letreros racistas pintados en las paredes, pareciera no haber lugar seguro. Una nueva realidad se está viviendo en muchos vecindarios, familias viviendo bajo el miedo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: De día es un estudiante universitario y de noche bailarín exótico. Para unos era su guía espiritual, para otros era un peligro para su comunidad.

programme.title: Lo mejor de "El gordo y la flaca"
programme.desc: Los mejores chismes de celebridades y las últimas noticias de la industria del entretenimiento.

programme.title: Lo mejor de Primer impacto

programme.title: Chucho Valdés, Concha Buika, Rodney Barreto & Dreiser Durruthy Bombale
programme.desc: ‘Jazz a Vienne' is one of the world's most prestigious jazz festivals. Ever since 1981 it has attracted leading jazz artists, with many of them playing return engagements. Unsurprisingly, the festival's 2013 edition did not fall short of expectations: the lineup was filled with the biggest names in music. Among them were Chucho Valdes and his Afro-Cuban Messengers, the prime example of Latin-inspired jazz music. Together with vocalists Concha Buika and Dreiser Durruthy Bombale, Rodney Barreto on drums, Gaston Joya on double bass, Yaroldy Abreu Robles on congas, and Reinaldo Melian Alvarez on trumpet, the legendary pianist brings the streets of Havana to the festival's stage.

programme.title: Billie Holiday
programme.desc: “God Bless The Child”, “Foolin' Myself”, and “I Loves You, Porgy”: timeless songs that were made classics by the inimitable Billie Holiday. ‘Lady Day', as her loyal friend and musical partner Lester Young nicknamed her, was a highly original jazz and pop singer. In a career that spanned most of the 1930s, 1940s and 1950s, she displayed an uncanny ability to convey emotion through her voice. Her vocals, which were strongly inspired by instrumental jazz, are admired for their deeply personal and intimate sound. This compilation features recordings from the 1950s of Billie Holiday singing a string of her greatest successes. Enjoy this unique footage of one of jazz's all-time greats!

programme.title: Roy Ayers
programme.desc: ‘The legend of the groove' is a series of documentaries devoted to the musicians who were most influential on contemporary hip hop, soul, rhythm 'n' blues, and on the course of history. Between the late 1950s and now, these musicians radically changed music. Although sometimes hardly in the public eye, they have all been major sources of inspiration for today's major artists: Prince, Erykah Badu, Janis Joplin and Jimi Hendrix.

programme.title: Christian McBride
programme.desc: On July 20, 2018, double bassist Christian McBride presented his band ‘New Jawn' at the Malta Jazz Festival. A five-time Grammy winner, McBride is one of the most requested, most recorded, and most respected figures in the music world today. Hailing from Philadelphia, this music luminary combines jazz, R&B, pop/rock, hip hop/neo-soul, and classical. Gracing the Malta Jazz stage with him are Nasheet Waits (drums), Marcus Strickland (tenor sax), and Josh Evans (trumpet).

programme.title: Ryan Porter & Kamasi Washington
programme.sub-title: Ryan Porter & The West Coast Get Down - BIRD
programme.desc: Los Angeles-born saxophonist Kamasi Washington and trombonist Ryan Porter co-founded West Coast Get Down – a musical collective fusing jazz and funk with hip-hop. It is partly because of this collective that jazz saw a resurgence in Los Angeles, subtly eclipsing the long-established jazz mecca of the world, New York City. The two musicians join forces and take the vibes of Los Angeles to jazz club BIRD in Rotterdam, the Netherlands.

programme.title: Yumi Ito
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Philip Catherine, Jean-Louis Rassinfosse & Chet Baker
programme.sub-title: Jazz a la Grand Place Chet Baker Trio
programme.desc: Two top-tier Belgian musicians – guitarist Philip Catherine and bassist Jean-Louis Rassinfosse – accompany American jazz trumpeter and vocalist Chet Baker during this 1985 performance at the beautiful Brussels Jazz Club, located on the Grand-Place, the Belgian capital's central square. The trio plays Charlie Mariano's “Crystal Bells”, the title track of their acclaimed 1983 album. Other songs played during this legendary concert include “Down” and “How Deep is the Ocean”.

programme.title: Avishai Cohen
programme.desc: Double bassist Avishai Cohen's trio with Noam David (drums) and Omri Mor (pianist) joined forces with the international Symphony Orchestra ‘INSO-Lviv', conducted by Christian Schumann. On June 24, 2017 they brought Avishai Cohen's signature blend of influences from Eastern Europe, American jazz and the Middle East to the Alfa Jazz Festival in Lviv, Ukraine. Cohen, who also supplies vocalizations in the Judeo-Spanish dialect Ladino, came to prominence internationally in the 1990s when jazz great Chick Corea offered him a place in his trio and a recording deal. Thirty years later, Cohen has become a house-hold name himself, leaving his Ukrainian audience enthralled and connected through the universal language of music.

programme.title: Art Farmer
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Charles Bradley
programme.desc: On April 26, 2012, the world-famous vocalist Charles Bradley and his Extraordinaires grace the stage of the Cigale in Paris. Success did not come easily for the American. Before Bradley (1948-2017) even considered a career as a singer, he tried to make ends meet with countless odd jobs. Only in 1996 he finally followed in the footsteps of his great idol, soul icon James Brown. Brown and Bradley shared the talent to bring an audience to ecstasy. With his mix of funk, soul, and R&B, Bradley has developed a sound of his own, in which a keen ear might find a few traces of James Brown.

programme.title: Matthias Goerne, Vilde Frang, Nicolas Altstaedt & Stathis Karapanos
programme.sub-title: J. S. Bach - Arias, solos, and duets
programme.desc: Baritone Matthias Goerne teams up with violinist Vilde Frang, cellist Nicolas Altstaedt, flutist Stathis Karapanos, and harpsichordist Michaela Hasselt in this program dedicated to the music of J. S. Bach. They perform baritone arias from Bach's most beautiful cantatas, as well as solo pieces and duets. On the program are Sonata No. 3 in C major for violin solo, BWV 1005 arias ‘Hier, in meines Vaters Stätte', BWV 32 and ‘Die Welt mit allen Königreichen', BWV 59 Suite No. 5 in C minor for cello solo, BWV 1011 ‘Wenn Trost und Hülf ermangeln muß', BWV 117 ‘Ja, ja, ich halte Jesum fest', BWV 157 Invention No. 7 in E minor, BWV 778 Invention in A major, BWV 783 and ‘Welt ade, ich bin dein müde', BWV 158. This performance was recorded at St. Mary's Church in Wittenberg, Germany.

programme.title: Daniel Barenboim
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Václav Luks & Collegium 1704
programme.desc: J. S. Bach's six Brandenburg Concerto's belong to his best-known works. The composer wrote these concertos between 1711 and 1720 and dedicated them in 1721 to Christian Ludwig, Margrave of Brandenburg. In celebration of the pieces' 300th anniversary, Czech harpsichordist and conductor Václav Luks and the renowned Baroque ensemble Collegium 1704 recorded all six Brandenburg Concertos on historical instruments in 2021. The concertos are based on the Italian concerto grosso form, in which a group of solo instruments is set against a large ensemble. Bach's Brandenburg Concertos feature remarkable combinations of solo instruments and virtuoso solos. This performance was recorded at the Hall of Mirrors in the Köthen Castle, Germany.

programme.title: Herbert Blomstedt & Gewandhausorchester Leipzig
programme.sub-title: Symphonies in D by Mozart and Voríšek
programme.desc: Conductor Herbert Blomstedt and the Gewandhausorchester take us on a musical journey to the Czech Republic in this 2020 concert from Leipzig's Gewandhaus. The program opens with Bohemian composer Jan Václav Hugo Voríšek's Symphony in D major, Op. 23 (1821). Although the composition – Voríšek's only symphony – was never performed during the composer's lifetime, it has become one of his most-performed works today. Also on the program is Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Symphony No. 38 in D major, K. 504. This work, which premiered while Mozart was visiting Prague in 1787, is often referred to as the ‘Prague Symphony'.

programme.title: Seong-Jin Cho
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer, Budapest Festival Orchestra & Richard Goode
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphonies and Piano Concerto No. 4
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra (BFO) in a concert program dedicated to the music of Ludwig van Beethoven. The program opens with the composer's Symphony No. 1 in C major, Op. 21. Afterward, Fischer conducts Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 4 in G major, Op. 58, in which Richard Goode features as the soloist. The acclaimed American pianist (1943) is known for his interpretations of the Beethoven repertoire. Goode recorded all five Beethoven piano concertos with the BFO and Fischer, earning him exceptional critical acclaim and a Grammy Award nomination. As an encore, Goode performs the Sarabande from J. S. Bach's Partita in B-flat major, BWV 825. The program closes with Beethoven's famous Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on January 29, 2017.

programme.desc: David Gilmour - Remember That Night: Live at the Royal Albert Hall is recorded by guitarist David Gilmour where he presents live tracks from the album On an Island and some hits from his former band Pink Floyd.

programme.title: Country
programme.desc: Country Music's roots are found in the mountains of Appalachia. The people who lived in the mountains had come from Western Europe they had brought their Celtic music with them they had brought their English ballads with them too. But when they migrated from the mountains, when they went down into Tennessee, then they took their music with them. In the Great Depression of the 1930s, there were huge communities of displaced people. A lot of people travelling to places like Nashville, to Georgia, to the cities, and of course, across to California. And they were facing grinding poverty, facing being uprooted from their homeland, and from family members. So the radio very often became the connection to the old world. Radio programmers realised that there was an audience for these genres of music, which reminded people of home. They started putting on these barn dance shows, where musicians would come and play live. People would tune in and listen to that music that reminded them of where they had come from.

programme.title: Southern Rock
programme.desc: Southern Rock was a marriage of historical, cultural, and musical forces. It was a reflection of the values and culture of the American South. It was mix of Rock and Roll, with Blues, Country, Boogie-woogie, fast-paced guitars. Lyrics really talk about a celebration of maybe a slower way of living, and family values, but also, the excesses of young adults in the Southern States. All of these bands were really good musicians, Boogie Rock and Roll, versed in the Blues, versed in Rock and Roll, but expressing the reality of their lives.Stories about the South, about the hopes and dreams of average working-class men and women. The first Rock and Rollers, Jerry Lee Lewis, Elvis Presley, Fats Domino, Bo Diddley they were almost all Southerners, and they came from the Black Southern tradition of Gospel, of Blues, and that mutated into the original Rock and Roll.

The works showcase red's emotive power, from fiery abstract paintings to crimson-hued photographs, offering a visual journey through the spectrum of human emotions.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E1: Shades Of Blue — Delve into the captivating world of blue and its soothing, tranquil essence. Through a masterful interplay of tones and textures, each piece evokes a profound sense of serenity, depth, & contemplation. Immerse yourself in a journey of introspection.
